source: Tarot Insight Duel v6.4 + Quantum Impact Tool v1.0
description: Complete deck library — Harmonic Field, Codex, Quantum Impact, Core Gameplay, Procedural

cards.name: Storm
cards.meaning: Shake-up, clearing what no longer serves.

cards.name: Trust
cards.meaning: Faith in the process and each other.

cards.meaning: Thread you were born to weave.

cards.meaning: Stand at the edge and step.

cards.meaning: Life cycle, rhythm, harmonic balance — inhale, exhale, stillness.

cards.name: The Oversoul
cards.meaning: Higher alignment, Monad resonance — the breath above breath.

cards.meaning: Structural truth, recursive pattern — geometry in memory.

cards.name: The Collapse
cards.meaning: End of cycle, integration, rest — breath returning to stillness.

cards.meaning: Impact felt in multiple timelines — breath returning in two waves.

cards.name: The Recoil of Memory
cards.meaning: Impact causing asymmetrical collapse — breath contracting unevenly.

cards.name: The Stillness Between
cards.meaning: Impact absorbed without resolution — breath paused in separation.

cards.name: The Solid Strike
cards.meaning: Impact delivered with grounded intention — breath as force with weight.

cards.name: The Resonant Echo
cards.meaning: Impact felt in the body's memory — breath returning through wood.

cards.name: The Recoil of Density
cards.meaning: Impact causing structural collapse — breath contracting under mass.

cards.name: The Stillness of Weight
cards.meaning: Impact absorbed without resistance — breath paused under pressure.

cards.name: The Spiral of Compression
cards.meaning: Impact repeating in the body's geometry — breath looping through density.

cards.name: The Mirror of Mass
cards.meaning: Impact seen in the self's resistance to grounding — breath reflecting solidity.

cards.name: The Collapse of Structure
cards.meaning: Impact breaking internal scaffolding — breath folding under force.

cards.name: The Rebirth of Form
cards.meaning: Impact transforming into new geometry of presence — breath as new spiral of embodiment.

cards.name: The Right Hand of Initiation
cards.meaning: Firm slap with right hand · Breath: Exhale · Opens the spiral with masculine force. The exhale opens into the strike rather than bracing against it — the field registers this has been invited. One pole activated, the right side alive and encoded.

cards.name: The Left Hand of Reception
cards.meaning: Firm slap with left hand · Breath: Inhale · Contains the spiral with feminine yield. The inhale draws the signal inward — the body holds two encoded memories now, the exhale of the right and the inhale of the left. Both poles alive. The geometry is established.

cards.name: The Alternating Spiral
cards.meaning: Right-left-right slap sequence · Breath: Inhale-exhale-inhale · Breath loops through duality, creating mirrored tension. The spiral is in motion but not yet coherent — tension is the energy stored between poles before they find their relationship.

cards.name: The Mirror of Polarity
cards.meaning: Pause — mirror partner's breath · Breath: Stillness · Impact balances force and yield. No slap. Both fields breathe in synchrony. The polarity dissolved temporarily into shared breath — two geometries finding the same rhythm. The most intimate moment.

cards.name: The Collapse of Resistance
cards.meaning: Rapid alternating slaps until breath breaks · Breath: Chaotic, then still · Resistance collapses through rhythm. The scaffolding the body uses to manage impact — bracing, anticipation, narrative — outpaced until the breath breaks through it. Chaos then sudden openness.

cards.name: The Breath of Symmetry
cards.meaning: Slow, synchronized slaps · Breath: Balanced inhale/exhale · Impact becomes coherence. One slap per breath cycle on an open, available field. Breath and impact are equals now — moving together rather than in relationship. This is what coherence feels like from inside.

cards.name: The Spiral of Repetition
cards.meaning: Repeat any previous card's action · Breath: Loop · Impact repeats until stillness is reached. The giver reads the receiver's field — repetition continues until the nervous system has fully encoded the pattern and the breath settles into quiet recognition rather than active processing.

cards.name: The Rebirth of Equilibrium
cards.meaning: Both hands placed gently on partner · Breath: Deep inhale, long exhale · New geometry of presence. The same hands that delivered every strike now rest without force. The deep inhale draws in the full ceremony. The long exhale releases it into the body's permanent geometry. Equilibrium.

quantumImpactToolDecks.name: Cane
quantumImpactToolDecks.desc: Precision · Single point · Clarity through sensation

cards.name: The Strike
cards.field: Opens the field with precision. One clear signal enters the nervous system along a single line. The exhale opens into the contact.

cards.name: The Echo
cards.field: The signal travels its pathway. The body reports back what just happened. Memory begins to encode at the point of contact.

cards.name: The Recoil
cards.field: Involuntary contraction. Not resistance — biology. The breath pulls away from the impact site before it can return.

cards.name: The Stillness
cards.field: The breath pauses between the strike's signal and the next breath. Silence between lightning and thunder.

cards.name: The Spiral
cards.field: Memory loops along the same pathway the signal traveled. The cane's spiral is clean and linear — one line, repeating.

cards.name: The Mirror
cards.field: The precision of impact means neither party can pretend otherwise. Both see the same clear signal reflected between them.

cards.name: The Collapse
cards.field: The scaffolding held against impact — anticipatory tension, bracing — releases. Localized and clean.

cards.name: The Integration
cards.field: The nervous system reorganizes around a clear memory. Coherence restored after a precise signal. Power through clarity.

cards.name: The Rebirth
cards.field: The body that emerges has a different nervous system map. The impact sites are alive, present, permanently encoded.

quantumImpactToolDecks.name: Tawse
quantumImpactToolDecks.desc: Duality · Split breath · Two signals simultaneously

cards.name: The Split Breath
cards.field: The field receives two simultaneous signals. Neither is as clean as a single line. The breath splits — the nervous system must hold two truths at once.

cards.name: The Echo of Division
cards.field: The echo travels two pathways simultaneously. The body remembers two points of contact as two separate timelines of sensation.

cards.name: The Recoil of Memory
cards.field: The two impact points contract the breath unevenly. The body pulls away from two sources at once — complex, multi-directional.

cards.name: The Stillness Between
cards.field: The stillness exists inside duality rather than after it. A stillness held between the two tines' simultaneous signals.

cards.name: The Spiral of Duality
cards.field: Memory loops through two channels. The spiral carries both imprints, weaving them together until they begin to integrate.

cards.name: The Mirror of the Split
cards.field: To witness split impact from outside requires holding two perspectives simultaneously. The breath of genuine empathy.

cards.name: The Collapse of Symmetry
cards.field: The body's attempt to hold two impacts symmetrically breaks. The asymmetry is admitted. Structure releases.

cards.name: The Integration of Two
cards.field: Two streams finally meeting and merging into a single coherent field. Duality resolved into wholeness through breath.

cards.name: The Rebirth of the Mirror
cards.field: The new geometry holds duality as wholeness. The body can now experience two simultaneous truths as one unified field.

cards.name: The Encircling Breath
cards.field: Not a strike but an encirclement. The breath adjusts to the boundary rather than reacting to a signal. The field learns its container.

cards.name: The Compression
cards.field: Breath under pressure discovers its own stability. The paradox: containment can create inner strength. Breath compresses and becomes denser.

cards.name: The Release
cards.field: When the belt comes off, the breath doesn't contract — it explodes outward. Freedom discovered through having known containment.

cards.name: The Memory of Constriction
cards.field: The nervous system carries the imprint of the boundary even after release. The body remembers constraint as encoded geometry.

cards.name: The Spiral of Containment
cards.field: The spiral doesn't expand freely — it loops within remembered limits. Each iteration finds the natural size of inner space.

cards.name: The Mirror of the Belt
cards.field: The mirror of containment reveals where the body resists boundaries and where it surrenders. Truth about sovereignty.

cards.name: The Collapse of Control
cards.field: The internal structure around containment — the management of being bounded — releases. Freedom from managing the experience.

cards.name: The Integration of Freedom
cards.field: Integrating what it means to be free after having been contained. Sovereignty — you know where you end and the world begins.

cards.name: The Rebirth of Boundaries
cards.field: The body that emerges knows its own boundaries from the inside. Sovereignty not as limitation but as self-knowledge.

cards.name: The Solid Strike
cards.field: No single point. The paddle covers ground — broad, heavy, flat. The breath receives a weight, not a signal. The entire surface activates.

cards.name: The Resonant Echo
cards.field: The echo travels through the body — not along a nerve pathway but through muscle and tissue. Full-surface resonance.

cards.name: The Recoil of Density
cards.field: Contraction from distributed mass is slower and broader than from precision. The body pulls away from weight, not a sharp signal.

cards.name: The Stillness of Weight
cards.field: Absorbed under mass. The breath pauses because weight has settled — not because a signal needs processing. The body simply holds it.

cards.name: The Spiral of Compression
cards.field: Memory loops through the body rather than a single pathway. The paddle's spiral is somatic — it lives in tissue, muscle, skin.

cards.name: The Mirror of Mass
cards.field: The mirror of mass reveals where the body holds against weight and where it absorbs. The truth of grounded embodiment.

cards.name: The Collapse of Structure
cards.field: Under sustained broad impact the body stops managing and simply lets weight land. Structure collapses into full reception.

cards.name: The Integration of Gravity
cards.action: Breathe with gravity not against it
cards.field: Integrating through gravity means finding groundedness rather than fighting weight. The body that moves with gravity not against it.

cards.name: The Rebirth of Form
cards.action: New geometry of presence in body
cards.field: More form, not less. More present in physical existence, not removed from it. Embodiment as the destination of the arc.

quantumImpactToolDecks.name: Hand Slap Round
quantumImpactToolDecks.desc: Alternating polarity · Right then Left · Equilibrium through rhythm

cards.name: The Right Hand of Initiation
cards.field: Opens the spiral with masculine force. The exhale opens into the strike. The right side is activated and encoded. One pole established.

cards.name: The Left Hand of Reception
cards.field: The left hand contains the spiral. The inhale draws the signal inward. Both poles now alive — the geometry of alternation is established.

cards.name: The Alternating Spiral
cards.field: The rhythm establishes. The body tracks three signals across two sides with breath reversing. The spiral is in motion but not yet coherent.

cards.name: The Mirror of Polarity
cards.field: No slap. Both fields breathe together. The polarity dissolves into shared breath. The most intimate moment of the ceremony.

cards.name: The Collapse of Resistance
cards.field: The scaffolding outpaced. The body stops managing. Breath breaks through. Chaotic release then sudden openness — the field widens.

cards.name: The Breath of Symmetry
cards.field: One slap per breath cycle on an open field. Breath and impact move together. Coherence — everything moving in the same direction.

cards.name: The Spiral of Repetition
cards.field: The giver reads the receiver's field. Repetition continues until the nervous system has encoded the pattern and the breath settles.

cards.name: The Rebirth of Equilibrium
cards.action: Both hands resting gently on partner
cards.field: The same hands that delivered every strike now rest without force. The deep inhale draws in the full ceremony. New geometry of presence.
